aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic foundation for AEO with a clear service offering and contact information but lacks content depth, reviews, and structured data optimization.
quick_wins: Generate and showcase customer reviews to build trust and improve local search presence.
Expand website content to include detailed service descriptions, benefits, and keyword-rich blog posts.
Implement a clear call-to-action on the homepage to capture leads and improve conversion rates.

gbp_analysis.summary: The website includes location-specific information and service areas, but lacks depth in local content and structured data for GBP.
critical_issues: No Google Business Profile (GBP) reviews or engagement.
Lack of localized content targeting San Jose and Morgan Hill areas.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone) information on its website but lacks citations across major directories and local listings.
action_items: Create and verify listings on major directories such as Yelp, Yellow Pages, and Bing Places.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms, including social media and local directories.
Encourage customers to leave reviews on citation sites to boost local search visibility.

schema_gaps: Local business schema with detailed address and service information
Review schema to showcase customer testimonials

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of localized content and structured data for AI-driven search algorithms.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Voice search and AI-driven local search queries due to insufficient structured data and content depth.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implement local business schema and expand content to include location-specific keywords and phrases.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Leverage customer reviews and testimonials to build authority and improve AI-driven search rankings.

page_title: San Jose, CA HVAC Service - Pelle Heating & Air Conditioning
